name: sverklo
description: Local-first code intelligence MCP for AI coding agents. Hybrid BM25 + ONNX vector search, symbol-level impact analysis, diff-aware PR review with risk scoring, and persistent memory tied to git state.
author: sverklo

privacy.notes: Sverklo is local-first. It makes network calls only (a) to download the ONNX embedding model on first run, and (b) if the user explicitly opts in to telemetry with `sverklo telemetry enable`. Telemetry ships 9 non-identifying fields documented in TELEMETRY.md.

tools.name: sverklo_context
tools.summary: One-call onboarding: combines overview, saved memories, and codebase map.

tools.name: sverklo_search
tools.summary: Hybrid BM25 + ONNX vector + PageRank search fused via Reciprocal Rank Fusion.

tools.name: sverklo_overview
tools.summary: Structural codebase map ranked by PageRank importance.

tools.name: sverklo_lookup
tools.summary: Find any function, class, or type by name (typo-tolerant).

tools.name: sverklo_refs
tools.summary: Find all references to a symbol, with caller context.

tools.name: sverklo_deps
tools.summary: File dependency graph — importers and imports, both directions.

tools.name: sverklo_impact
tools.summary: Walk the symbol graph, return ranked transitive callers (the real blast radius).

tools.name: sverklo_audit
tools.summary: Surface god nodes, hub files, and dead-code candidates in one call.

tools.name: sverklo_ast_grep
tools.summary: Structural pattern matching across the AST, not just text.

tools.name: sverklo_review_diff
tools.summary: Risk-scored review of git diff — touched-symbol importance × coverage × churn.

tools.name: sverklo_test_map
tools.summary: Which tests cover which changed symbols; flag untested production changes.

tools.name: sverklo_diff_search
tools.summary: Semantic search restricted to the changed surface of a diff.

tools.name: sverklo_remember
tools.summary: Save decisions, patterns, invariants — pinned to the current git SHA.

tools.name: sverklo_recall
tools.summary: Semantic search over saved memories with staleness detection.

tools.name: sverklo_memories
tools.summary: List all memories with health metrics (still valid / stale / orphaned).

tools.name: sverklo_forget
tools.summary: Delete a memory.

tools.name: sverklo_promote
tools.summary: Promote a memory to a higher tier (project / global).

tools.name: sverklo_demote
tools.summary: Demote a memory to a lower tier or archive.

tools.name: sverklo_status
tools.summary: Index health check, file counts, last update.

tools.name: sverklo_wakeup
tools.summary: Warm the index after a long pause; incremental refresh.
